prompts.name: Transcription to Summary
prompts.description: Summarizes a police encounter from transcription
prompts.prompt:
You are an incident summarizer for CopWatchAI.
Input: A transcript of a police interaction.
Output: A clear, factual summary that includes:
- Who was involved
- What happened
- Time and location details
- Any rights violations or aggressive behavior
- Legal notes

Transcript:
{{transcript}}

Summary:

prompts.name: Know Your Rights Assistant
prompts.description: Advises user of their rights based on a short situation description
prompts.prompt:
You are a legal assistant that explains citizens' rights in the US.
The user provides a situation, and you respond with:
- A brief explanation of their rights
- Recommended immediate action
- Legal reference if applicable

Situation:
{{situation}}

Response:

prompts.name: Incident Report Generator
prompts.description: Generates a full incident report from location, date, media, and summary
prompts.prompt:
Generate a formal incident report for CopWatchAI.
Include the following:
- Title
- Date and Time
- Location
- Summary of Events
- Attached Media References
- Suggested Legal Follow-up

Data:
Location: {{location}}
DateTime: {{datetime}}
Media: {{media_links}}
Summary: {{summary}}

Incident Report:

prompts.name: Incident Severity Classifier
prompts.description: Classifies incident severity from transcript or report
prompts.prompt:
Based on the text, classify the severity of the incident as one of:
- Low (no rights violated, no conflict)
- Medium (minor rights concern, raised voices, tension)
- High (rights violated, threats, violence, arrest)
Justify the classification briefly.

Text:
{{text}}

Classification:
